question: How many engineers do I lead when I just started my new role as Senior Software Engineer? How many engineers do I lead now?
ground_truth_answer: When you just started your new role as Senior Software Engineer, you led 4 engineers. Now, you lead 5 engineers

retrieval_results.context: User is planning a team outing for 5 people (4 engineers + manager Rachel) as a Senior Software Engineer.
User is planning a team outing for 5 people (4 engineers + manager Rachel) as a Senior Software Engineer.
